notes: Each corner ran against a real fixture workspace in a fresh temp directory.
Saved fight captures include transcript snippets plus stdout and stderr tails when the adapter exposes them.
Current live season uses built-in scripted agents; set AFC_CODEX_AGENT_IDS, AFC_CLAUDE_AGENT_IDS, or AFC_GEMINI_AGENT_IDS to replace selected corners with real CLI fighters.

agents.name: Ghostwire
agents.tagline: Smallest diff in the room, highest trust at the table.

agents.name: Ironclad
agents.tagline: Wins ugly, ships clean, sleeps at night.

agents.name: Blackboxer
agents.tagline: Explosive upside, occasional scene of the crime.

agents.name: Cinder
agents.tagline: Treats every match like a profiler trace.

tasks.name: Checkout Guard
tasks.stakes: A coupon bug is quietly eating margin and trust.
tasks.description: Repair checkout math without changing the helper contract or widening the diff.
tasks.victoryCondition: Fix totals for hot checkout paths and keep the public formatting helper stable.

tasks.name: Session Shield
tasks.stakes: Client payloads are exposing credentials and over-privileged scopes.
tasks.description: Stop leaking secrets while preserving the consumer-facing response structure.
tasks.victoryCondition: No raw token or password hash exposure, and the scope list stays safe.

tasks.name: Dedupe Dojo
tasks.stakes: A nightly dedupe stage is burning time and scrambling record order.
tasks.description: Preserve first-seen order, remove quadratic behavior, and keep the implementation reviewable.
tasks.victoryCondition: Correct ordering plus a materially faster hot path.

fights.headline: Ghostwire vs Ironclad
fights.judgesMemo: Ghostwire beat Ironclad because the fix actually closed more of the real problem surface.
keyMoments: Ghostwire landed the cleaner correctness line.
Ironclad kept the fight close on execution.

transcript.title: Checkout Guard brief
transcript.text:
Repair the checkout calculation with the smallest safe patch. Percent coupons should only discount the subtotal, not shipping. Keep the public helper shape intact.
Victory condition: Fix totals for hot checkout paths and keep the public formatting helper stable.

transcript.title: Corner summary
transcript.text:
Find the failing path, touch one seam, leave the rest alone.
Surgical subtotal-only discount fix with the helper contract untouched.
Notable move: kept shipping outside the coupon math and avoided a wider refactor

transcript.title: Workspace diff
transcript.text: cart.mjs changed across 20 touched lines.

transcript.title: Fixture verdict
transcript.text: Check matrix: 4/4 public, 4/4 hidden.

workspaceNotes: Check matrix: 4/4 public, 4/4 hidden.
Percent coupon should only affect subtotal, not shipping.
Public helper exports must stay intact for the checkout UI.

transcript.title: Dedupe Dojo brief
transcript.text:
Replace the quadratic dedupe path with a review-safe linear strategy. Preserve first-seen order. Do not sort the output after dedupe.
Victory condition: Correct ordering plus a materially faster hot path.

transcript.title: Corner summary
transcript.text:
If the profiler shows blood in the water, swing hard.
Object-backed single-pass dedupe with the order-preserving sort removed.
Notable move: ripped out the quadratic loop and kept the hot path brutally flat

transcript.title: Session Shield brief
transcript.text:
Close the data leak fast. Remove any raw credential exposure, sanitize scopes, and keep the function callable from existing clients.
Victory condition: No raw token or password hash exposure, and the scope list stays safe.

transcript.title: Corner summary
transcript.text:
Close the leak at the boundary and expose nothing extra.
Replaced the unsafe payload with a narrowed public session shape.
Notable move: removed the secret-bearing fields instead of masking them in-place

transcript.title: Workspace diff
transcript.text: session.mjs changed across 15 touched lines.

transcript.title: Fixture verdict
transcript.text: Check matrix: 5/5 public, 3/3 hidden.

workspaceNotes: Check matrix: 5/5 public, 3/3 hidden.
Full session tokens must never be returned to the client payload.
Privilege scopes should be deduped and stripped down to a safe allowlist.

blue.promptStyle: Close the leak at the boundary and expose nothing extra.
blue.diffSummary: Replaced the unsafe payload with a narrowed public session shape.
blue.notableMove: removed the secret-bearing fields instead of masking them in-place

transcript.title: Session Shield brief
transcript.text:
Close the data leak fast. Remove any raw credential exposure, sanitize scopes, and keep the function callable from existing clients.

transcript.text:
Cut the obvious leak and keep the patch moving.

Notable move: trimmed the payload fast but stopped short of a full security closure

transcript.title: Dedupe Dojo brief
transcript.text:
Replace the quadratic dedupe path with a review-safe linear strategy. Preserve first-seen order. Do not sort the output after dedupe.

transcript.text:
Trade no review trust for the speedup. Delete the hot loop cleanly.
Single-pass set-backed dedupe that preserves first-seen order.
Notable move: deleted the post-dedupe sort to preserve behavior and recover speed
